All right, welcome back to module two. In this module, we are going to go through the three meta-states of an empowered sale. So in this first lesson, we're gonna introduce what these three states are, give you a taste of why we are seeking to establish and reinforce them throughout our enrollment calls, and just give you a sense of how they all work together before we move into deeper breakdowns of all three. So once again, this is our complete CTC enrollment framework, and as you can see, meta-state safety is paramount. It's really supporting what's happening in part one. Power is really what is supporting part two as they seek to actualize all that potential they built up, and what's driving all of it is really this meta-state of possibility. So I almost want you to imagine everything else on this chart being invisible, or at least shaded out for now, and just focus, at least for this module, and obviously on your sales calls when you implement this, on establishing these three states, you can almost forget about everything else, but as long as someone feels a sense of safety, a sense of power, and a sense of possibility, there is a good chance that they're gonna be able to be empowered to say yes to the opportunity at hand. So when it comes to making powerful, life-changing decisions, and that is what you are asking someone to make, typically on an enrollment call, in our context, otherwise known as our ability to actually process the opportunity at hand and act on it, is just as, if not more important, than the content that is actually being spoken about on the call, and the best way to drive this home is to think of a marriage proposal, right? You could have the same couple with the same dreams, hopes, ambitions, the same backstory, the same history together, the same everything, right? And someone's gonna make a marriage proposal, right? AKA the biggest enrollment someone could ever have really asked for, and two different contexts, right? That ask can come, you know, after Thanksgiving dinner at the in-laws when everyone is a little bit tense, when people aren't exactly feeling safe and expressive in who they are, and they're not feeling connected to vision and possibility because they've been on the defensive the entire evening, or it could be on an intimate retreat in Bali, right? Where someone is feeling expansive, where someone is feeling in their power, where someone is feeling connected to all the things that they wanna accomplish and achieve and feel in their life, right? So same couple, but one of these contexts is what is going to yield a much more favorable, beneficial, memorable, and powerful, yes to that opportunity. So that's what we're gonna be going for in establishing these three metastates. And what I've discovered is that we're most receptive to change and transformation, right? To very scary, potentially scary words to our ego, to elements of us who feel a little bit challenged by the opportunity to move forward, but we typically are more receptive when we feel connected to a sense of safety, right? When we feel connected to our sense of power, our ability to actually move forward. And of course, when we're connected to a sense of expanded possibility, what is actually available to us if we take this radical leap? What vision do we actually have for our lives that can be realized if we actually tap into it and actualize all that potential? So these metastates, when cultivated, make the person you're coaching far less likely to run into things like resistance, closure, contraction, and powerlessness, which actually create defensiveness, dissociation, and distancing on a sales con. These are typically the quote unquote challenges people run into and then they try to overcome it and essentially try to do all these things to overcome these states which never really needed to be on the call to begin with, right? Especially if we are focusing on cultivating, establishing, and then growing and reinforcing these metastates right from the beginning, right? And it makes perfect sense. For someone to make a powerful decision, they need to feel powerful. For someone to take a risk, a risk in this leap they're trying to make in their life or career, a risk in the financial investment, they need to feel an underlying sense of safety beneath them, right? And they're trying to break through the inertia of change, which is so real and so strong sometimes, they need to feel pulled by this vision, by this sense of expanded possibility. So that is why we are cultivating these three states and they all really work together, right? Safety is the container. It's established right at the beginning and reinforced all throughout. And I kind of like to think of this as the Volvo shell of the car that they're driving through this whole process. Safety comes in also reconciling the past, right? A lot of people when it comes to achieving the things that you're gonna help them achieve, they don't necessarily have the best, most positive memories and experiences of that, right? And they need to feel safety around that by reconciling the past. Whereas power power is more of a pulse that you want to end up pulsating brighter and faster as you go through the call because it pumps a new sense of courage and resourcefulness through those layers of inertia and resistance. So I like to think of this as the engine of the car, it's driving forward and it gets more and more powerful as you continue down that journey. So this is how we connect our prospect to their capacity to drive forward, to move forward. And then vision and possibility, right? This is the direction. This is where they are driving toward. It's what pulls someone through that call. It's what gathers them. All that resourcefulness and energy to channel that power. No one wants to channel power unless they know where they're heading, right? That just kind of feels like wasted energy, wasted output. So all of these states work together throughout the call. And of course, they're not linear. It's not a matter of saying one thing and all of a sudden safety is present or asking one question here and all of a sudden power is present, right? These are states that we need to attune to to make sure that our prospect is feeling safe, is feeling powerful and feeling connected to that vision, right? It could be exponential. They could lose it for a moment and then all of a sudden it explodes, right? And they're super connected to it. So our goal is to establish it as early as possible to attune to whether it's wavering or increasing and make sure we are reinforcing their connection to those three states throughout. So that's what we're gonna be learning more about how to do through this module. It is really the core, the foundation of what really makes everything else in this process so powerful and so successful when you're handling these sales calls. So I encourage you to take notes as you go through this module, but most importantly, next time you are on a call with a prospect, just keep asking yourself, is this person feeling safe? Is this person feeling connected to their powers? Is this person feeling connected to their vision? And when you see that that is wavering just a little bit, take a moment and see if you can connect them back to it. So that's what I got for you here. This is just the introduction. We're gonna go deeper into all three states. So take a moment and I'll meet you in the next lesson. Bye for now.
